title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.571 - Contingent effective date
text:
644.571.  Contingent effective date. — Section 644.570 shall become effective only upon approval by the voters of a constitutional amendment submitted to them by the 94th general assembly, amending Article III, Section 37(h), regarding financing and constructing storm water control plans, studies, and projects.
(L. 2008 S.B. 1040 § B) 
Revisor's Note:  The amendment to Article III, Section 37(h) was approved by the voters on November 4, 2008.
